title: Effect
description: A mechanical benefit granted by a feature, trait, feat, fighting style, spell-trigger, etc. The 'type' field selects an effect handler in modules.character_builder._apply_effect. Phase 5 (audit D6-4) closes 'type' to the 28 currently-used effect types. New types MUST be added to this enum, given a handler in _apply_effect (or a documented store-on-source equivalent), an entry in docs/FEATURE_EFFECTS.md, and a test — all in the same PR. The closed enum pairs with the strict mode in modules.strict_mode that the dispatcher enforces at apply time. additionalProperties is true so each effect type may carry whatever payload its handler needs.

type.description: Effect handler key. Closed enum as of Phase 5 / D6-4. To add a new type, follow the contract in .github/instructions/effects-system.instructions.md.
